FreeText: The spa is extraordinary. The alpine massage left me completely restored. Already planning my return.
Pre-booked the Alpine Signature Spa Package — once again it did not disappoint. The best massage I have ever experienced. The therapist remembered my preferences from my last visit.
The holiday penthouse experience was magical. The spa on Christmas Eve is a tradition now. This resort defines luxury.
My fourth stay at Park City. It never disappoints. The spa team remembered my preferences — that is what real luxury feels like.
The Alpine Signature Spa Package is the reason I keep coming back. Simply world-class. The mountain setting makes it even more special.
Sixth stay and this place gets better every time. The signature spa package is unrivaled anywhere I have traveled. My absolute favourite resort.
Wonderful ski weekend punctuated by the most restorative spa day. The staff always know exactly what I need without being asked.
Eight stays and Park City is still my favourite place in the world. The spa team is simply the best. I will be back every year for as long as they will have me.
Disappointed. The room was very outdated — peeling wallpaper and old fixtures throughout. Staff were pleasant but the property needs serious renovation. Expected much more from a Contoso resort.
Returned hoping the renovation had helped. The room is still outdated and tired. I will not be staying at Myrtle Beach again. This does not feel like a Contoso property.
The rooftop bar is stunning. Loved the boutique atmosphere — very different from Park City but equally delightful. Great concierge recommendations.
Always a treat. The concierge arranged wonderful theater tickets. The rooftop remains the city's best-kept secret. Will return for my next New York trip.
